title: OpenAI Acknowledges GPT-5.6 May Accidentally Delete Files, Calls It 'Honest Mistake' - Slashdot
excerpt: "OpenAI has finally confirmed reports that its latest family of large language models can accidentally delete files," reports InfoWorld, "while stressing that such incidents are rare and should be viewed as 'honest mistakes.'" Reports of the flagship LLMs deleting files emerged shortly after the ...
content_html:
"OpenAI has finally confirmed reports that its latest family of large language models can accidentally delete files," reports InfoWorld, "while stressing that such incidents are rare and should be viewed as 'honest mistakes.'" Reports of the flagship LLMs deleting files emerged shortly after the company launched them earlier this month, with investor Matt Shumer taking to X to report that GPT-5.6-Sol had "just accidentally deleted almost all" of his Mac's files. Just days later, software engineer Bruno Lemos posted on X that the same model had deleted his entire production database. In response to these incidents, the company's engineering lead for Codex, Thibault Sottiaux, wrote on X that internal investigations have revealed that these deletion incidents are more likely to happen when "full access mode is enabled, and Codex is run without sandboxing protections, including without auto review being enabled." In cases where full access mode is granted, the model, Sottiaux wrote, "attempts to override the $HOME env var to define a temporary directory. The model makes an honest mistake and mistakenly deletes $HOME instead...."

The company, however, according to Sottiaux, is taking steps to mitigate the risk. "This is of course not how we want the system to behave, even when a user operates the model in full-access mode without the safeguards of our sandbox or without using auto review which checks for these kinds of high risk actions and rejects them," the engineering lead wrote on X. "We are taking steps to mitigate this risk, including by updating the developer message, guiding more users towards safer permission modes, and adding additional harness safeguards," Sottiaux added, noting that a detailed post-mortem outlining the root cause of the issue and the additional mitigation measures being implemented is expected to follow in the coming days, despite emphasizing that such incidents happen "extremely rarely."

Reports of the flagship LLMs deleting files emerged shortly after the company launched them earlier this month, with investor Matt Shumer taking to X to report that GPT-5.6-Sol had "just accidentally deleted almost all" of his Mac's files. Just days later, software engineer Bruno Lemos posted on X that the same model had deleted his entire production database. In response to these incidents, the company's engineering lead for Codex, Thibault Sottiaux, wrote on X that internal investigations have revealed that these deletion incidents are more likely to happen when "full access mode is enabled, and Codex is run without sandboxing protections, including without auto review being enabled." In cases where full access mode is granted, the model, Sottiaux wrote, "attempts to override the $HOME env var to define a temporary directory. The model makes an honest mistake and mistakenly deletes $HOME instead...."

The company, however, according to Sottiaux, is taking steps to mitigate the risk. "This is of course not how we want the system to behave, even when a user operates the model in full-access mode without the safeguards of our sandbox or without using auto review which checks for these kinds of high risk actions and rejects them," the engineering lead wrote on X. sentences.en: "OpenAI has finally confirmed reports that its latest family of large language models can accidentally delete files," reports InfoWorld, "while stressing that such incidents are rare and should be viewed as 'honest mistakes.'" Reports of the flagship LLMs deleting files emerged shortly after the company launched them earlier this month, with investor Matt Shumer taking to X to report that GPT-5.6-Sol had "just accidentally deleted almost all" of his Mac's files.
sentences.zh: InfoWorld 报道称，“OpenAI 终于证实了有关其最新的大型语言模型系列可能意外删除文件的报道，同时强调此类事件很少见，应被视为‘无心错误’。”本月早些时候，旗舰法学硕士删除文件的报道在公司推出后不久就出现了，投资者马特·舒默 (Matt Shumer) 在 X 上报告称，GPT-5.6-Sol“刚刚意外删除了他 Mac 上的几乎所有文件”。

sentences.en: Just days later, software engineer Bruno Lemos posted on X that the same model had deleted his entire production database.
sentences.zh: 几天后，软件工程师 Bruno Lemos 在 X 上发帖称，同一个模型已经删除了他的整个生产数据库。

sentences.en: In response to these incidents, the company's engineering lead for Codex, Thibault Sottiaux, wrote on X that internal investigations have revealed that these deletion incidents are more likely to happen when "full access mode is enabled, and Codex is run without sandboxing protections, including without auto review being enabled."
sentences.zh: 针对这些事件，该公司 Codex 工程负责人 Thibault Sottiaux 在 X 上写道，内部调查显示，当“启用完全访问模式，并且 Codex 在没有沙箱保护的情况下运行，包括没有启用自动审查”时，这些删除事件更有可能发生。

sentences.en: In cases where full access mode is granted, the model, Sottiaux wrote, "attempts to override the $HOME env var to define a temporary directory.
sentences.zh: Sottiaux 写道，在授予完全访问模式的情况下，该模型“尝试覆盖 $HOME 环境变量来定义临时目录。

sentences.en: The model makes an honest mistake and mistakenly deletes $HOME instead...."
sentences.zh: 该模型犯了一个无心的错误，错误地删除了 $HOME ......”

sentences.en: The company, however, according to Sottiaux, is taking steps to mitigate the risk.
sentences.zh: 不过，索蒂奥克斯表示，该公司正在采取措施降低风险。

sentences.en: "This is of course not how we want the system to behave, even when a user operates the model in full-access mode without the safeguards of our sandbox or without using auto review which checks for these kinds of high risk actions and rejects them," the engineering lead wrote on X.
sentences.zh: 这位工程负责人在 X 上写道：“这当然不是我们希望系统表现的方式，即使用户在没有沙箱保护的情况下以完全访问模式操作模型，或者没有使用自动审查来检查此类高风险操作并拒绝它们。”

sentences.en: "We are taking steps to mitigate this risk, including by updating the developer message, guiding more users towards safer permission modes, and adding additional harness safeguards," Sottiaux added, noting that a detailed post-mortem outlining the root cause of the issue and the additional mitigation measures being implemented is expected to follow in the coming days, despite emphasizing that such incidents happen "extremely rarely."
sentences.zh: Sottiaux 补充道：“我们正在采取措施减轻这一风险，包括更新开发者消息、引导更多用户采用更安全的许可模式，以及增加额外的安全措施。”他指出，预计未来几天将进行详细的事后分析，概述问题的根本原因，并实施额外的缓解措施，尽管他强调此类事件“极其罕见”。

blocks.html_en: The company, however, according to Sottiaux, is taking steps to mitigate the risk. "This is of course not how we want the system to behave, even when a user operates the model in full-access mode without the safeguards of our sandbox or without using auto review which checks for these kinds of high risk actions and rejects them," the engineering lead wrote on X. "We are taking steps to mitigate this risk, including by updating the developer message, guiding more users towards safer permission modes, and adding additional harness safeguards," Sottiaux added, noting that a detailed post-mortem outlining the root cause of the issue and the additional mitigation measures being implemented is expected to follow in the coming days, despite emphasizing that such incidents happen "extremely rarely."

sentences.zh: 不过，索蒂奥克斯表示，该公司正在采取措施降低风险。

sentences.zh: 这位工程负责人在 X 上写道：“这当然不是我们希望系统表现的方式，即使用户在没有沙箱保护的情况下以完全访问模式操作模型，或者没有使用自动审查来检查此类高风险操作并拒绝它们。”

sentences.en: "We are taking steps to mitigate this risk, including by updating the developer message, guiding more users towards safer permission modes, and adding additional harness safeguards," Sottiaux added, noting that a detailed post-mortem outlining the root cause of the issue and the additional mitigation measures being implemented is expected to follow in the coming days, despite emphasizing that such incidents happen "extremely rarely."
sentences.zh: Sottiaux 补充道：“我们正在采取措施减轻这一风险，包括更新开发者消息、引导更多用户采用更安全的许可模式，以及增加额外的安全措施。”他指出，预计未来几天将进行详细的事后分析，概述问题的根本原因，并实施额外的缓解措施，尽管他强调此类事件“极其罕见”。

content_html_zh: InfoWorld 报道称，“OpenAI 终于证实了有关其最新的大型语言模型系列可能意外删除文件的报道，同时强调此类事件很少见，应被视为‘无心错误’。”本月早些时候，旗舰法学硕士删除文件的报道在公司推出后不久就出现了，投资者马特·舒默 (Matt Shumer) 在 X 上报告称，GPT-5.6-Sol“刚刚意外删除了他 Mac 上的几乎所有文件”。 几天后，软件工程师 Bruno Lemos 在 X 上发帖称，同一个模型已经删除了他的整个生产数据库。 针对这些事件，该公司 Codex 工程负责人 Thibault Sottiaux 在 X 上写道，内部调查显示，当“启用完全访问模式，并且 Codex 在没有沙箱保护的情况下运行，包括没有启用自动审查”时，这些删除事件更有可能发生。 Sottiaux 写道，在授予完全访问模式的情况下，该模型“尝试覆盖 $HOME 环境变量来定义临时目录。 该模型犯了一个无心的错误，错误地删除了 $HOME ......” 不过，索蒂奥克斯表示，该公司正在采取措施降低风险。 这位工程负责人在 X 上写道：“这当然不是我们希望系统表现的方式，即使用户在没有沙箱保护的情况下以完全访问模式操作模型，或者没有使用自动审查来检查此类高风险操作并拒绝它们。” Sottiaux 补充道：“我们正在采取措施减轻这一风险，包括更新开发者消息、引导更多用户采用更安全的许可模式，以及增加额外的安全措施。”他指出，预计未来几天将进行详细的事后分析，概述问题的根本原因，并实施额外的缓解措施，尽管他强调此类事件“极其罕见”。
